name: Recruiter: TEST broken selector (fault injection)
description: THROWAWAY fault-injection workflow for the AI self-healing (shadow) system. NOT in registry. Navigates to Talent home (benign, no mutation) then a checkpoint click with a deliberately BROKEN selector so the run HARD-FAILS — to exercise the failure-diagnosis hook. The 'Recruiter:' name prefix + /talent/ target make the diagnosis hook fire even though there is no recruiter event_kind.

steps.intent: Open the 'Proyectos' (Projects) tab in the Recruiter top navigation
